artifacts.title: New receipt from 2026-04-01
artifacts.excerpt: I repeat this to every new joiner at Anthropic but it's worth repeating in public -- we have a blameless culture and no single individual is at fault when bespoke complex systems break at scale

artifacts.title: New receipt from 2022-06-07
artifacts.excerpt:
Hey @GergelyOrosz,

Just had a new joiner today at Google trying to argue that we should do Agile. Pointing him directly at your article made it clearer and faster why we don't typically do it. 

https://t.co/H8UB8BYxch

Thanks a lot for writing it!
